errors.network: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
errors.server: A server error occurred. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.not_found: The requested page was not found.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.validation: Please check the information you entered.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to your MyMoney account.
login.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
login.error_account_locked: Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed attempts. Please try again later.
login.error_account_inactive: This account is inactive. Please contact support.
login.error_email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address first. Check your inbox.
login.session_ended: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create your MyMoney account.
register.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
register.email_taken: This email address is already registered.
register.password_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
register.display_name_en_hint: Auto-filled from your name — you can edit it.
register.date_of_birth_error: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
register.profile_image_error_type: Only JPG and PNG images are allowed.
register.profile_image_error_size: Image size exceeds the maximum allowed (5 MB).
register.confirmation_note: A confirmation link will be sent to your email.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
forgot.hint: Check your inbox and spam folder after submitting.
forgot.success_message: If your email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Enter a strong new password for your account.
reset.password_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
reset.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in.
reset.invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.expired_token: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

confirm_email.title: Email Confirmation
confirm_email.success_message: Your email has been confirmed successfully. Your account is ready.
confirm_email.error_message: This link is invalid or has expired.
confirm_email.expired_message: This confirmation link has expired. You can request a new one.
confirm_email.invalid_token: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
confirm_email.resend_success_message: If your email is registered and unconfirmed, you'll receive a new confirmation link shortly.

change_password.heading: Change Password
change_password.subheading: Choose a strong password to protect your account.
change_password.new_password_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
change_password.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully.
change_password.error_same_password: New password must be different from the current one.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.subheading: Monitor your financial performance from one place.
dashboard.breakdown_empty_desc: Expense breakdown will appear here once you record transactions.
dashboard.recent_empty_desc: Add your first transaction to start your financial journey.
dashboard.empty_desc: Start recording your transactions and your financial insights will appear here.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.avatar_hint: JPG, PNG or WebP — max 5 MB
profile.avatar_drop_hint: Drag & drop your photo here, or click to browse
profile.resend_verification_success: A verification link has been sent to your inbox.
profile.email_change_success: A confirmation link has been sent to your new email. Check your inbox.
profile.email_pending_desc: A confirmation link was sent to:
profile.email_pending_hint: Check your new inbox and click the confirmation link.
profile.email_pending_cancel_confirm: Cancel the pending email change request?

settings.heading: Settings
settings.change_password_desc: Choose a strong password to protect your account. Your current session stays active after changing.
settings.sessions_desc: View and manage active login sessions for your account across all devices.
settings.sessions_revoke_others_confirm: Revoke all other sessions? Your current session will remain active.
settings.sessions_revoke_others_success: All other sessions have been revoked.
settings.sessions_sign_out_confirm: Sign out this device? You will be redirected to the login page.
settings.confirm_email_change_success_message: Your email address has been changed successfully. Please sign in again.
settings.confirm_email_change_error_message: The link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
settings.change_email_desc: Update the email address associated with your account.
settings.currency_desc: Set how amounts are displayed across the app.
settings.currency_base_hint: The currency you primarily earn and spend in.
settings.currency_display_hint: Amounts are converted to this currency for display.

transactions.heading: Transactions
transactions.subheading: Track, filter, and analyse every movement of your money.
transactions.empty_desc: Try adjusting your filters or add your first transaction.
transactions.empty_filtered: No results match your current filters.
transactions.toast_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
transactions.analytics_subtitle: Visual breakdown of your financial activity.
transactions.analytics_breakdown_empty: No expense data for the selected period.

reports.heading: Reports
reports.subheading: Generate, download, and manage your financial Excel reports.
reports.generate_success: Report is being generated. You'll receive an email notification when it's ready.
reports.history_empty_desc: Generate your first report using the form above.
reports.delete_confirm_desc: The file will be permanently removed.
reports.download_error: Could not download the report. Please try again.
reports.email_note: You will receive an email notification when the report is ready.

errors_page.403_message: Sorry, you don't have permission to access this page.
errors_page.404_message: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors_page.500_message: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.subheading: Stay up to date with your account activity.
notifications.prefs_desc: Choose which notification categories to receive.
notifications.pref_security_desc: Password changes, sessions, and security alerts.
notifications.pref_reports_desc: Report ready and generation failure alerts.

fil.heading: Financial Intelligence
fil.subheading: Smart insights and personalised recommendations to improve your financial health.
fil.insights_empty_desc: You're on track! New insights will appear here when financial patterns are detected.
fil.recommendations_empty_desc: Your finances are looking great! New recommendations will appear when improvement opportunities arise.
fil.spending_empty_desc: Add transactions to see spending analysis here.
fil.no_data_desc: Add your transactions to start your financial intelligence journey.

recurring.heading: Recurring & Subscriptions
recurring.subheading: Manage your recurring transactions and subscriptions in one place.
recurring.frequency_fixed_note: Transaction type, frequency, and start date cannot be changed after creation.
recurring.delete_rec_desc: Delete this recurring transaction? All future occurrences will be cancelled.
recurring.delete_sub_desc: Delete this subscription? All future renewals will be cancelled.
recurring.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
recurring.rec_empty_desc: Add your first recurring income or expense to automate your financial tracking.
recurring.sub_empty_desc: Add your subscriptions to track monthly and annual expenses.
recurring.upcoming_empty_desc: No payments or renewals due in the coming days.

goals.heading: My Financial Goals
goals.subheading: Plan your dreams and track your progress towards achieving them.
goals.wizard_choose_type: Choose the type of goal you want to achieve
goals.field_description_ph: Why does this goal matter to you? (optional)
goals.field_initial_amount_hint: Do you have existing savings for this goal? (optional)
goals.contrib_empty: No contributions yet. Add your first savings!
goals.linked_recurring_empty: No recurring transactions linked to this goal.
goals.link_recurring_hint: Choose a recurring transaction to automatically link to this goal.
goals.unlink_confirm: Unlink this recurring transaction from the goal?
goals.created_success: Goal created! Start your savings journey.
goals.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
goals.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This cannot be undone.
goals.completed_desc: You've reached your goal "{name}"! Amazing work, keep it up!
goals.empty_desc: Create your first goal and start working towards your dreams.
goals.empty_filtered_desc: Try adjusting your filters to find your goals.

cash_flow.heading: Cash Flow Forecast
cash_flow.subheading: See where your finances are headed — projected up to 12 months ahead.
cash_flow.risks_subtitle: Identified financial risks in your forecast horizon
cash_flow.risks_empty_desc: Your financial forecast looks healthy for the projected period.
cash_flow.goals_subtitle: Estimated completion dates based on your current financial pace
cash_flow.goals_empty_desc: Create financial goals to see projected completion dates here.
cash_flow.recurring_subtitle: Fixed monthly obligations included in this forecast
cash_flow.sim_subtitle: Adjust assumptions to see how changes affect your forecast
cash_flow.no_data_desc: We need more financial data to generate your forecast. Add transactions or set up recurring items to get started.

budgets.heading: My Budgets
budgets.subheading: Set spending limits and stay in control of every category.
budgets.wizard_choose_type: Choose the budget type that best fits your goal
budgets.type_fixed_desc: A fixed spending limit per period.
budgets.type_percentage_desc: A percentage of your monthly income.
budgets.type_annual_desc: A yearly budget spread across 12 months.
budgets.type_flexible_desc: Adjusts based on your spending patterns.
budgets.field_end_date_hint: Leave blank for an ongoing budget.
budgets.field_auto_renew_hint: Automatically start a new period when the current one ends.
budgets.delete_confirm_desc: Delete this budget and all its period history? This cannot be undone.
budgets.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
budgets.empty_desc: Create your first budget to take control of your spending.

calendar.heading: Financial Calendar
calendar.subheading: Every bill, goal, budget, and reminder — in one place.
calendar.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
calendar.empty_desc: Create your first calendar event to start tracking your financial timeline.

receipts.heading: Receipts
receipts.subheading: Upload, organise, and manage all your financial documents.
receipts.upload_accepted_formats: Supported: JPG, PNG, PDF, HEIC, WebP, GIF (max 10 MB)
receipts.upload_duplicate: This file already exists in your receipts.
receipts.preview_no_preview: Preview not available for this file type.
receipts.delete_confirm_body: This receipt will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
receipts.tags_delete_confirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from all receipts.
receipts.tags_empty: No tags yet. Create your first tag.
receipts.empty_desc: Upload your first receipt to get started. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, PDF, HEIC.
receipts.empty_filtered_desc: Try adjusting your filters or search term.

welcome.title: Welcome to MyMoney 👋
welcome.desc: Your personal finance dashboard is ready. Let's take a couple of minutes to set things up so you can start tracking your money right away.

explore_and_create_transaction.title: Explore & Add a Transaction
explore_and_create_transaction.desc: Head to the Transactions page, explore how it works, and record your first income or expense to bring your dashboard charts to life.

generate_reports.title: Generate a Report
generate_reports.desc: Visit the Reports page to generate a financial summary, transaction detail, or category analysis report — all downloadable as PDFs.

track_profile.title: Complete Your Profile
track_profile.desc: Add a profile photo and update your personal details. A complete profile makes the experience feel personal to you.

settings.title: Explore Settings
settings.desc: Review your security settings, manage active sessions, and customise your account preferences — all from the Settings page.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.desc: One last click and your workspace is ready. Click Finish Setup to close this guide and start managing your money.

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.desc: You're all set. Your dashboard is ready to help you take control of your finances. Great job!

workspace.dashboard_subheading: Monitor your team's activity and financial collaboration.
workspace.members_subheading: Manage who has access and what they can do.
workspace.invitations_subheading: Invite people and track pending invitations.
workspace.roles_subheading: See what each role can do in this workspace.
workspace.settings_subheading: Update your workspace name, logo, type, and preferences.
workspace.type_immutable_hint: Workspace type cannot be changed after creation.
workspace.suspend_confirm: Suspend this member? They will lose access until reinstated.
workspace.remove_confirm: Remove this member from the workspace?
workspace.leave_confirm: Leave this workspace? You will lose all access.
workspace.delete_confirm: Delete this workspace? All members will lose access. This cannot be undone.
workspace.empty_desc: Create your first workspace to start collaborating with your team.
workspace.accept_already_used: This invitation has already been used.
workspace.accept_email_mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
workspace.no_permission: You don't have permission to perform this action.
workspace.suspend_confirm_body: Suspend {name}? They will lose access until reinstated.
workspace.reinstate_confirm_body: Reinstate {name}? They will regain access to the workspace.
workspace.remove_confirm_body: Remove {name} from the workspace? This cannot be undone.
workspace.settings_readonly_notice: You are in read-only mode. Contact the workspace owner to edit settings.
workspace.leave_desc: Leaving will remove your access to all workspace data. The owner can re-invite you later.
workspace.delete_desc: Permanently delete all content, members, and records. This cannot be undone.
workspace.leave_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to leave this workspace? You will lose access immediately.
workspace.delete_confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. Type the workspace name to confirm.
workspace.reject_done_body: You declined to join the workspace. The sender can re-invite you at any time.
workspace.accept_success_body: You joined successfully. You can now collaborate with team members.
workspace.accept_expired_body: This invitation has expired. Ask the sender to send a new invitation.
workspace.accept_invalid_body: This link is invalid or has already been used. Check your email or request a new invitation.
workspace.perm_denied_body: You don't have permission to view this content in the current workspace.

currency.page_subtitle: Manage currencies, exchange rates, and preferences.
currency.rates_empty_desc: Set a manual rate or trigger a sync to get started.
